initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic' AND a.element = 'H' AND b.bond_type = 'triple' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id AND m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE (a.element = 'H' AND a2.element = 'H') OR (a.element = 'H' AND a2.element = 'H');

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic' AND a.element = 'H' AND b.bond_type = 'triple' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON m.molecule_id = c.atom_id OR m.molecule_id = c.atom_id2
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE a.element = 'H' AND b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a1.element = 'H' AND a2.element = 'H' AND b.bond_type = 'triple' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE a.element = 'H' OR a2.element = 'H';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT a.molecule_id 
        FROM atom a 
        WHERE a.element = 'H' 
        AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM connected c 
            JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id 
            WHERE (c.atom_id = a.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a.atom_id) 
            AND b.bond_type = 'triple'
        )
    ) THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id 
    FROM atom a 
    WHERE a.element = 'C' OR a.element = 'N' OR a.element = 'O' OR a.element = 'S' OR a.element = 'P' OR a.element = 'Se' OR a.element = 'As' OR a.element = 'Sb' OR a.element = 'Bi' OR a.element = 'Te' OR a.element = 'Po'
);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'H' AND b.bond_type = 'triple' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT a.molecule_id 
        FROM atom a 
        WHERE a.element = 'H' 
        AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM connected c 
            JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id 
            WHERE (c.atom_id = a.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a.atom_id) 
            AND b.bond_type = 'triple'
        )
    ) THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id 
    FROM atom a 
    WHERE a.element = 'C' OR a.element = 'N' OR a.element = 'O' OR a.element = 'S' OR a.element = 'P' OR a.element = 'Se' OR a.element = 'As' OR a.element = 'Sb' OR a.element = 'Bi' OR a.element = 'Te' OR a.element = 'Po'
);
